screen_rationale: Metadata identified floral polymorphism, pollinating and florivorous insects, and fitness implications. The listed OUP route did not provide full text, and no eligible DataCite, Dryad, or Zenodo package was recovered. This is an M0 access conclusion only; no trait roles or effects are inferred from metadata.

OpenAlex metadata identifies experimental florivory plus early-season floral anthocyanin and condensed-tannin measures. DataCite, Dryad, and Zenodo yielded no eligible article-linked package. Retain as a separate source pending a public full-text/table screen; do not infer B_flower, an effect, or independence from the 2018 Impatiens panel.
